<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Plugins; use Pest\Contracts\Plugins\HandlesArguments; use Pest\Exceptions\InvalidOption; use Pest\TestSuite; /** * @internal */ final class Snapshot implements HandlesArguments { use Concerns\HandleArguments; /** * {@inheritDoc} */ public function handleArguments(array $arguments): array { if (! $this->hasArgument('--update-snapshots', $arguments)) { return $arguments; } if ($this->hasArgument('--parallel', $arguments)) { throw new InvalidOption('The [--update-snapshots] option is not supported when running in parallel.'); } TestSuite::getInstance()->snapshots->flush(); return $this->popArgument('--update-snapshots', $arguments); } }
